summary.curriculumTitle: T-44C E-2D INTERMEDIATE MULTI-SERVICE PILOT TRAINING SYSTEM (MPTS) MASTER CURRICULUM GUIDE

items.curriculumTitle: T-44C E-2D INTERMEDIATE MULTI-SERVICE PILOT TRAINING SYSTEM (MPTS) MASTER CURRICULUM GUIDE
items.discussText:
Seat and rudder pedal adjustment, fuel management panel, pilot instrument panel, engine 
instruments and switches, center instrument panel, annunciator panel analysis, right seat 
instrument panel, circuit breaker panels, control pedestal, overhead control panel, MFD, 
checklists: before start, engine start, after start, brake check (out of chocks), engine run-up, 
takeoff, after landing, and secure

items.curriculumTitle: T-44C E-2D INTERMEDIATE MULTI-SERVICE PILOT TRAINING SYSTEM (MPTS) MASTER CURRICULUM GUIDE
items.discussText:
Takeoff procedures, checklist management, landing procedures, checklists: climb, cruise, 
descent, approach, landing, start malfunctions, and MFD operations, CRM callouts, and 
pressurization system malfunctions

items.curriculumTitle: T-44C E-2D INTERMEDIATE MULTI-SERVICE PILOT TRAINING SYSTEM (MPTS) MASTER CURRICULUM GUIDE
items.discussText:
Loss of brakes, hot brakes, brake fire, mechanical stops in throttle quadrant, inadvertent 
condition lever to fuel cutoff, engine failure at altitude, anti-ice and deice systems autopilot 
disengagement, and ground emergencies, anti-ice and deice systems, and windshield heating 
failure
topics:
inadvertent 
condition lever to fuel cutoff

anti-ice and deice systems autopilot 
disengagement

items.curriculumTitle: T-44C E-2D INTERMEDIATE MULTI-SERVICE PILOT TRAINING SYSTEM (MPTS) MASTER CURRICULUM GUIDE
items.discussText:
Vmca demo, dynamic engine cut, engine failure or fire during or after takeoff, fuel system 
malfunctions, smoke or fume emergencies, in-flight damage, bird strikes, wing or 
uncontrollable fire, ditching
topics: engine failure or fire during or after takeoff

items.curriculumTitle: T-44C E-2D INTERMEDIATE MULTI-SERVICE PILOT TRAINING SYSTEM (MPTS) MASTER CURRICULUM GUIDE
items.discussText:
Flap malfunctions, no-flap landings, gear malfunctions, unsafe gear and gear up landings, 
engine malfunctions, propeller malfunctions, electrical malfunctions, and air-starts
topics: unsafe gear and gear up landings

items.curriculumTitle: T-44C E-2D INTERMEDIATE MULTI-SERVICE PILOT TRAINING SYSTEM (MPTS) MASTER CURRICULUM GUIDE
items.discussText:
Basic air work, high-work maneuvers, landing patterns, and checklist 
management

items.curriculumTitle: T-44C E-2D INTERMEDIATE MULTI-SERVICE PILOT TRAINING SYSTEM (MPTS) MASTER CURRICULUM GUIDE
items.discussText:
Emergency procedures, simulated emergency scenarios, CRM during 
simulated emergencies, dynamic engine cut, SSE pattern work, and SSE 
(landings, wave-offs, touch-and-go), landing gear system and malfunctions

items.curriculumTitle: T-44C E-2D INTERMEDIATE MULTI-SERVICE PILOT TRAINING SYSTEM (MPTS) MASTER CURRICULUM GUIDE
items.discussText:
Maintaining aircraft control during emergencies, pattern considerations, 
communications, and CRM

items.curriculumTitle: T-44C E-2D INTERMEDIATE MULTI-SERVICE PILOT TRAINING SYSTEM (MPTS) MASTER CURRICULUM GUIDE
items.discussText:
Night flying environment, field lighting, aircraft lighting, observer duties, 
outside scan techniques, see and avoid, porpoised landing, CRM guidelines and callouts, and 
night instrument approaches

items.curriculumTitle: T-44C E-2D INTERMEDIATE MULTI-SERVICE PILOT TRAINING SYSTEM (MPTS) MASTER CURRICULUM GUIDE
items.discussText:
Instrument crosscheck, instrument takeoff, full-panel approach-to-stalls, stalls and spin 
recovery, high work maneuvers, and control and performance concept

items.curriculumTitle: T-44C E-2D INTERMEDIATE MULTI-SERVICE PILOT TRAINING SYSTEM (MPTS) MASTER CURRICULUM GUIDE
items.discussText:
Unusual attitudes, pitot-static system, flight instrument characteristics, ESIS operation, wet 
compass characteristics, and departure procedures

items.curriculumTitle: T-44C E-2D INTERMEDIATE MULTI-SERVICE PILOT TRAINING SYSTEM (MPTS) MASTER CURRICULUM GUIDE
items.discussText:
Anti-icing system, emergency or minimum fuel state, TERPs, IFR En route Supplement, 
Flight Information Handbook, NOTAMs, and autopilot/flight director usage

items.curriculumTitle: T-44C E-2D INTERMEDIATE MULTI-SERVICE PILOT TRAINING SYSTEM (MPTS) MASTER CURRICULUM GUIDE
items.discussText:
IAF and FAF procedures (6T’s, descent, and lead turns), CRM callouts and techniques, GCA 
approach, PAR, ASR, and ILS configuration point, ASR recommended altitudes, NAVAID 
setup (takeoff, en route, approach, and missed approach), cockpit procedures (en route versus 
multiple terminal approaches, task management), and point-to-point navigation
topics:
cockpit procedures (en route versus 
multiple terminal approaches

items.curriculumTitle: T-44C E-2D INTERMEDIATE MULTI-SERVICE PILOT TRAINING SYSTEM (MPTS) MASTER CURRICULUM GUIDE
items.discussText:
Holding, missed approach holding versus HILO procedures, VOR and TAC approach 
procedures, missed approach, circling procedures, circling missed approach (determining 
MAP and continuation beyond MAP), needle-only approach procedures, and continuous 
descent final approach (CDFA)
topics: missed approach holding versus HILO procedures

circling missed approach (determining 
MAP and continuation beyond MAP)

items.curriculumTitle: T-44C E-2D INTERMEDIATE MULTI-SERVICE PILOT TRAINING SYSTEM (MPTS) MASTER CURRICULUM GUIDE
items.discussText:
NATOPS Instrument Flight Manual, SOPs, local instructions, NATOPS, LOC and LOC-BC 
approaches (configuration, presentation, MA, and FAF Identification by other than DME), 
ESIS procedures, reverse sensing, and TERPS
topics: and FAF Identification by other than DME)

items.curriculumTitle: T-44C E-2D INTERMEDIATE MULTI-SERVICE PILOT TRAINING SYSTEM (MPTS) MASTER CURRICULUM GUIDE
items.discussText:
RNAV(GPS) approach types (LNAV, LNAV/VNAV, LPV, TAA, T’s, and HILO), feeder fix 
selection of IAF, RNAV configuration point, RAIM, GPS sensitivity modes, autopilot and 
flight director, lost communications (FIH and LOA) , and SSE approach procedures.

CNATRAINST 1542.175D 
10 Jul 2025 
 
V-6
topics:
and SSE approach procedures.

CNATRAINST 1542.175D 
10 Jul 2025 
 
V-6

items.curriculumTitle: T-44C E-2D INTERMEDIATE MULTI-SERVICE PILOT TRAINING SYSTEM (MPTS) MASTER CURRICULUM GUIDE
items.discussText:
SSE approach procedures, SSE circling approach, procedure track (arc and radial combination 
and teardrop), emergency voice reports , departure procedures (SID, ODP, vector, diverse) 
and avionics system and malfunctions
topics:
procedure track (arc and radial combination 
and teardrop)

diverse) 
and avionics system and malfunctions

items.curriculumTitle: T-44C E-2D INTERMEDIATE MULTI-SERVICE PILOT TRAINING SYSTEM (MPTS) MASTER CURRICULUM GUIDE
items.discussText:
Weather filing criteria, turbulence and wind shear, icing, approach and landing minimums, 
ESIS approach, fuel system and malfunctions, in-flight damage and bird strikes

items.curriculumTitle: T-44C E-2D INTERMEDIATE MULTI-SERVICE PILOT TRAINING SYSTEM (MPTS) MASTER CURRICULUM GUIDE
items.discussText:
En route weather filing facilities (FSS and PMSV), STARS (filing, planning, and lost 
comms), SSE missed approach, and electrical system and malfunctions
topics: En route weather filing facilities (FSS and PMSV)

items.curriculumTitle: T-44C E-2D INTERMEDIATE MULTI-SERVICE PILOT TRAINING SYSTEM (MPTS) MASTER CURRICULUM GUIDE
items.discussText:
SSE configuration point with or without VNAV, flight director malfunctions, autopilot 
malfunctions and disconnect procedures, landing gear system and malfunctions, and propeller 
system and malfunctions
topics: SSE configuration point with or without VNAV

items.curriculumTitle: T-44C E-2D INTERMEDIATE MULTI-SERVICE PILOT TRAINING SYSTEM (MPTS) MASTER CURRICULUM GUIDE
items.discussText:
Operations limits quiz, IAF/FAF entry procedures (6 T’s, descent, and lead 
turns), pressurization system and malfunctions, electrical system, and CNAF-M 3710.7 weather 
filing criteria

items.curriculumTitle: T-44C E-2D INTERMEDIATE MULTI-SERVICE PILOT TRAINING SYSTEM (MPTS) MASTER CURRICULUM GUIDE
items.discussText:
Vmca, Vmcg, PIC decision making, WW versus convective SIGMET, weather considerations 
during emergencies, approach lighting, weight and balance form F, and other discussion items 
at the discretion of the IP
topics:
and other discussion items 
at the discretion of the IP

items.curriculumTitle: T-44C E-2D INTERMEDIATE MULTI-SERVICE PILOT TRAINING SYSTEM (MPTS) MASTER CURRICULUM GUIDE
items.discussText:
Memory items and deferred emergencies, NATOPS Procedures and situations not covered by 
NATOPS, changing flight plan in-flight, ATC priority handling, adaptability/flexibility during 
emergencies, and other discussion items at the discretion of the IP.

CNATRAINST 1542.175D 
10 Jul 2025 
V-24
topics:
NATOPS Procedures and situations not covered by 
NATOPS

and other discussion items at the discretion of the IP.

10 Jul 2025 
V-24
